005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.RPM;
009
010import java.util.function.DoubleSupplier;
011
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.util.shooter.InterpolationCalculator;
016
017import dev.doglog.DogLog;
018import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
019import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
022
023public abstract class Shooter extends SubsystemBase {
024
025    private static final Shooter instance;
026
027    private ShooterState state;
028
029    static {
030        if (Robot.isReal()) {
031            instance = new ShooterImpl();
032        } else {
033            instance = new ShooterSim();
034        }
035    }
036
037    public static Shooter getInstance() {
038        return instance;
039    }
040
041    protected Shooter() {
042        setState(ShooterState.SHOOT);
043    }
044
045    public void setState(ShooterState state) {
046        this.state = state;
047    }
048
049    public ShooterState getState() {
050        return this.state;
051    }
052
053    public void logMotor(String motorName, TalonFX motor) {
054        String stem = "Shooter/Motors/" + motorName + "/";
055        DogLog.log(stem + "MotorVoltage", motor.getMotorVoltage().getValueAsDouble());
056        DogLog.log(stem + "SupplyCurrent", motor.getSupplyCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
057        DogLog.log(stem + "StatorCurrent", motor.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
058        DogLog.log(stem + "RPM", motor.getVelocity().getValue().in(RPM));
059    }
060
061    /** Enum representing the different possible states of the shooter. */
062    public enum ShooterState {
063
064        // SOTM(() -> 0.0), 
065        // FOTM(() -> 0.0),
066        /** Shooter doesn't run. */
067        IDLE(() -> 0.0),
068        /** Shooter wheels spin at it's target RPM, interpolated based on distance to hub. */
069        // SHOOT(Settings.Shooter.SHOOT_TUNING_RPM), //TODO:Replace with interpolated RPM after data is gathered
070        /** Shooter wheels spin at it's target RPM, interpolated based on distance to ferry zone. */
071        // FERRY(Settings.Shooter.FERRY_TUNING_RPM),
072        SHOOT(() -> InterpolationCalculator.interpolateShotInfo().targetRPM()),
073        FERRY(() -> InterpolationCalculator.interpolateFerryingInfo().targetRPM()),
074        /** Shooter wheels spin at a predetermined constant rate without interpolation. */
075        MANUAL_HUB(Settings.Shooter.MANUAL_HUB_RPM);
076
077        /** The supplier for the target RPM of the shooter in the corresponding state. */
078        private DoubleSupplier RPMSupplier;
079
080        /**
081         * Constructs a ShooterState with the given supplier for the target RPM of the shooter.
082         * @param RPMSupplier the supplier for the target RPM of the shooter in the corresponding state
083         */
084        private ShooterState(DoubleSupplier RPMSupplier) {
085            this.RPMSupplier = RPMSupplier;
086        }
087
088        /**
089         * Gets the target angular velocity of the shooter in the corresponding state by converting the target RPM from the supplier to an AngularVelocity.
090         * @return the target angular velocity of the shooter
091         */
092        public AngularVelocity getTargetAngularVelocity() {
093            return RPM.of(RPMSupplier.getAsDouble());
094        }
095    }
096
097    public abstract AngularVelocity getCurrentAngularVelocity();
098
099    protected abstract void stopMotors();
100
101    public abstract SysIdRoutine getShooterSysIdRoutine();
102
103    public abstract void setVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage);
104
105    public boolean shooterSpunUp() {
106        return getCurrentAngularVelocity().gte(getState().getTargetAngularVelocity().minus(RPM.of(100)));
107    }
108
109    @Override
110    public void periodic() {
111        final ShooterState currentState = getState();
112        DogLog.log("Shooter/Target RPM", currentState.getTargetAngularVelocity().in(RPM));
113        DogLog.log("Shooter/State", currentState.name());
114        DogLog.forceNt.log("States/Shooter", currentState.name());
115        DogLog.forceNt.log("Shooter/At Target RPM", shooterSpunUp());
116    }
117}
